name: Small Fry
description: Small Fry is the Mini counterpart of the Fire Skylander Fryno in Skylanders: Trap Team.
biography: The Skylander Minis started off as regular 'Sidekicks,' assisting the Skylanders on many exciting adventures. And what they lacked in size they more than made up for in courage. Ultimately determined to become full-fledged heroes, they trained at the Skylands Academy - honing their powers and skills until they were ready. Now, they stand side by side with their full grown counterparts, ready to defend Skylands against Kaos and his evil minions.
personality: Small Fry has a short temper. It makes him a little hot under the collar. Like his mentor, Fryno, Small Fry always tells the truth, even when others don't want to hear it. He hates it when people lie and cheat.

story.content: Small Fry has a short temper. It makes him a little hot under the collar. Like his mentor, Fryno, Small Fry always tells the truth, even when others don't want to hear it. He hates it when people lie and cheat.

The Skylander Minis started off as regular 'Sidekicks,' assisting the Skylanders on many exciting adventures. And what they lacked in size they more than made up for in courage. Ultimately determined to become full-fledged heroes, they trained at the Skylands Academy - honing their powers and skills until they were ready. Now, they stand side by side with their full grown counterparts, ready to defend Skylands against Kaos and his evil minions.

trivia: He is the only Mini Skylander who is a counterpart of a character from Skylanders: Swap Force.
He and Pet-Vac are the only Mini counterparts of core Skylanders who didn't appear in Spyro's Adventure.
Small Fry makes an appearance in Skystones Overdrive as a Skystone of the Magic element, strangely. He is also the only Skylander to appear as a Skystone before Creation Clash.
Despite his nickname, he'll say Fryno's line of 'I'm no small fry!' when checking his stats.
His name is actually a play on the name for what you would call a little 'newly hatched fish'. 'A small fry'.
Some of his upgrades mistakenly refer to him as Fryno.
Small Fry's (and Fryno's) The Horn and The Hog attack makes him one of the fastest Skylanders in the series, even surpassing Drobot's Thruster Flight.
gameplay: Small Fry plays identically to Fryno, utilizing fast melee punches and a high-speed motorcycle charge. His 'The Horn and The Hog' attack makes him one of the fastest Skylanders in the series, even surpassing Drobot's Thruster Flight.

basic.name: Brawl
basic.content: Punch enemies with fiery rhino fists.

basic.name: Heated
basic.content: Release a burst of heat that damages nearby enemies.

basic_upgrades.name: The Horn And The Hog
basic_upgrades.content: Summon a flaming motorcycle to charge through enemies.

soulgems.name: Born to Ride
soulgems.content: The motorcycle charge lasts longer and deals more damage.

abilities.name: Hot Hands
abilities.content: Increases the damage of punching attacks.
